summary: Comprehensive testing of SinAdicciones platform - patient/professional profiles, habits, goals, Nelson chat, and trigger strategies. Critical UI bug found with input text color in dark mode.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - professional accesses patient data via /api/professional/report/{patient_id} instead

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Input text color is BLACK (rgb(0,0,0)) on dark background (rgb(13,13,13)) making text invisible. Style says color: '#FFFFFF' but computed style shows black. Affects all forms with TextInput in dark mode.

issues: Text typed in input fields is nearly invisible due to black text on dark background

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix TextInput text color on web - React Native Web not applying color: '#FFFFFF' properly. Need to check if web-specific style override is needed.
Verify all TextInput components across the app use proper text color for dark mode on web platform
critical_code_review_comments: TextInput style has color: '#FFFFFF' at line 1181 of goals.tsx, but web platform renders as black. May need Platform-specific styling or web CSS override.
Consider using StyleSheet.compose or Platform.select for web-specific input styling

success_rate.frontend: 90% - all features work except input text visibility issue

seed_data_creation: Demo patient and professional accounts pre-existing in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: TextInput color issue confirmed - style says #FFFFFF but computed style shows rgb(0,0,0). This is a React Native Web specific issue where the color property for TextInput may need different handling on web platform. Check all TextInput components across the app for this issue.

features_tested.patient_profile: PASS - shows days in recovery, triggers, protective factors
features_tested.plan_de_recuperacion: PASS - unified button shows Tu Reto, Gatillos, Factores Protectores, Para Qué, Contactos, Red de Apoyo
features_tested.habits_section: PASS - shows list with streaks, completion checkmarks
features_tested.metas_smart: PASS - shows weekly progress tracking with day markers (L M X J V S D)
features_tested.nelson_chat_patient_prompts: PASS - shows patient-specific quick prompts (Tengo ansiedad, Tengo ganas de consumir, etc.)
features_tested.professional_patients_list: PASS - shows 2 linked patients with recovery status
features_tested.professional_view_patient_data: PASS - can view habits, emotions, tasks, alerts for patient
features_tested.trigger_strategies_modal: PASS - clicking trigger shows modal with numbered tips and 'Entendido' button
features_tested.input_text_dark_mode: FAIL - text is BLACK on dark background, making it invisible

rca_of_issue: The TextInput color issue on React Native Web: While the StyleSheet defines color: '#FFFFFF', React Native Web may not properly translate this to CSS color property for input elements. The computed style shows rgb(0,0,0) which is the browser default. This could be due to: 1) RN Web version compatibility, 2) Need for explicit style prop on TextInput for web, 3) CSS specificity override needed. Mitigation: Add explicit style={{ color: '#FFFFFF' }} inline or use Platform.select for web-specific styling.
